title: MARV Manufacturing Update
excerpt: Avionics boards are populated and the airframe is in layup as we close in on IREC 2026.

blocks.text: With less than four months to IREC, MARV is moving from design into real hardware across every subteam.

blocks.caption: The MARV flight computer during integration testing.

items: Avionics: flight computer and radio boards populated and under test
Airframe: carbon-fiber body tubes in layup
Recovery: dual-deployment ground tests scheduled for March
Flight Dynamics: trajectory locked at a 2.1-caliber stability margin

blocks.text: Next up: full-stack integration and a test launch before the competition window.
